ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "experimental_condition" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental condition under which the image was obtained */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" INTEGER /* ID of the image type */,
  "research_group" TEXT /* Name of the research group that uploaded the image */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used to capture the image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "magnification" TEXT /* Magnification level used */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel information for fluorescence images */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_experimental_condition FOREIGN KEY ("experimental_condition") REFERENCES experimental_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_image_type FOREIGN KEY ("image_type") REFERENCES image_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rois" (
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROI */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the ROI is annotated on */,
  "x_in_pixels" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the ROI in pixels */,
  "y_in_pixels" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the ROI in pixels */,
  "roi_type" TEXT /* Type of ROI (e.g., Golgi, nuclei) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who annotated the ROI */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the ROI was annotated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "annotation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rois_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rois_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROI the measurement was made on */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., area, perimeter) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_roi_id FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the image type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the image type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the image type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, annotate) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
